message_raw: Table/column names interpolated into SQL via f-string text() at lines 219/223/227; safe today (policy.table/ts_column come from hardcoded RETENTION_POLICIES, cutoff is bound param) but fragile — any future user/config-driven policy field becomes SQLi

message_raw: fire_cron_user_job checks row.status=='scheduled' then queue.put then sets 'queued' in one transaction, but no test covers two simultaneous CronTrigger fires; double-enqueue is possible (consumer idempotency mitigates). Confirm at-most-once intent is actually upheld or accept double-queue
